'''鈭歾-z-ch-m''' ('''kazazchemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:phantasize|phantasize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-ch-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phantasize|phantasize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-z-ch-m
|-
! Lemma
| kazazchemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizazchemoko|thizazchemoko]] || [[word:jizazchemoko|jizazchemoko]] || [[word:shizazchemoko|shizazchemoko]] || [[word:kizazchemoko|kizazchemoko]]
|-

|-

|-
